summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Attendance Engine (محرك الحضور) for NASSAQ School Management System - Iteration 11. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. The attendance system is fully functional including: class selection, student list display, status changes (present/absent/late/excused), 'All Present' button, save attendance, daily report tab, and summary tab.
passed_tests: Backend: Login as school principal - 200 OK
Backend: GET /api/attendance/students-for-class/{class_id} - Returns students with attendance status
Backend: POST /api/attendance/bulk - Creates/updates attendance records
Backend: GET /api/attendance/report/daily/{class_id} - Returns daily attendance report
Backend: GET /api/attendance/report/summary - Returns attendance summary
Backend: Mark all present - Updates all students to present status
Backend: Verify attendance persistence - Data persists correctly
Backend: Status 'present' works correctly
Backend: Status 'absent' works correctly
Backend: Status 'late' works correctly
Backend: Status 'excused' works correctly
Frontend: Attendance page /admin/attendance loads without errors
Frontend: Class dropdown shows 23 classes
Frontend: Selecting class displays student list
Frontend: Student cards show status buttons (present/late/absent/excused)
Frontend: Clicking status buttons updates student status
Frontend: Stats cards update in real-time (Total, Present, Absent, Late, Excused)
Frontend: Progress bar shows attendance rate percentage
Frontend: 'All Present' button marks all students as present
Frontend: 'Save Attendance' button saves records successfully
Frontend: Success toast appears after saving
Frontend: Daily Report tab shows attendance summary and records table
Frontend: Summary tab shows overall statistics and daily trend
critical_code_review_comments: AttendancePage.jsx correctly implements all attendance features with proper data-testid attributes
Backend APIs properly handle bulk attendance creation/update with upsert logic
Status changes (present/absent/late/excused) work correctly with visual feedback
Daily report and summary tabs display accurate statistics
RTL Arabic layout is properly implemented throughout the page
seed_data_creation: Using existing class 'الرابع الابتدائي - أ' (ID: 79176f6e-ce18-40f1-b5c9-476fb49a884d) with 2 students: لمى الرشيدي and ريم الغامدي
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attendance Engine is fully functional. All 4 attendance statuses work (present, absent, late, excused). The page has 3 tabs: Record (تسجيل), Daily Report (التقرير اليومي), Summary (الملخص). Class 'الرابع الابتدائي - أ' has 2 students for testing. All APIs are working correctly: POST /api/attendance/bulk, GET /api/attendance/students-for-class/{class_id}, GET /api/attendance/report/daily/{class_id}, GET /api/attendance/report/summary.
